text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year ripe with opportunity<n>for Agnes
Digital to go big.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
By the way, how was your year-end<n>haul? Get
any good, uh, "reading<n>materials"?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh... never mind... We haven't known<n>each other
for even a year yet, so I<n>guess I shouldn't be
sticking my<n>nose into your business.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But, let's make it a goal to be able to<n>talk about
our favs by the, uh,<n>"summer market." What do
you say?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she means by<n>"reading
materials" and "markets,"<n>but I smile and nod.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
For now, let's reflect on the previous<n>year and
make plans for this one.<n>Last year, I stepped onto
the stage of<n>my dreams—the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I really got ahead of myself though,<n>huh? I have to
remember the whole<n>reason I came here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's time to get back in touch with the
fundamentals. I must obey the<n>commandments!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume are goddesses! Thou<n>shalt not
intrude upon them!<n>Especially when it comes to
racing<n>conversations.
choice_data_list:
Are you thinking about what happened with
Meisho Doto?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well... yeah. No matter how you look<n>at it, I totally
committed a<n>transgression...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I... I ought to just accept all<n>Umamusume
as they are! I want to<n>support them no matter their
situation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's my rule...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems the difference in her social<n>standing
between now and before<n>she debuted is still
somewhat unclear<n>to her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Which means that while I will strive<n>to do my
best in my races this year, I<n>also need to get back
to pure, proper,<n>unobtrusive simping.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume sure are great, huh? So,<n>the first
thing I want to do this year is<n>reaffirm how
amazing they are!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not sure exactly how I should<n>go about it.
Do you have any<n>recommendations?
choice_data_list: Let's do something to serve Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, acts of service! Good idea. And<n>this is the
perfect chance since<n>everyone's on break!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry and go purify the grounds<n>before a
certain someone gets there!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As soon as we reach the training<n>center, Agnes
Digital sets about<n>fervently sprucing up the dirt
track.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I think that should do it.Looks much easier to run on now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now I can only pray that it'll benefit<n>my precious
Uma's training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is that you, Digital? What are<n>you doing
here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: S-Scarlet... Um, I was just taking a<n>walk is all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah. That's good to hear. I was<n>worried someone
had beaten me at<n>being the first to train this year.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Speaking of which, I'm going to go<n>get a run in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: O-okaaay! Have a safe run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I'm glad I made it in time. I<n>figured she
would come here before<n>New Year's break
finished.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With this, I'm sure she'll have a<n>comfortable run.
Nice job, me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having predicted that Daiwa Scarlet<n>would come,
Agnes Digital<n>successfully manages to do a good
deed for an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Reading... Yeah, that could be nice...<n>and I know
just where to find a<n>treasure trove of
Umamusume<n>goodness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Or not... 'cause the library's a bust!<n>They don't
really carry what I'm<n>looking for...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I already have the largest<n>collection of
Umamusume literature in<n>my room. With that said,
see ya!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna spend this New<n>Year's with my
nose buried in all the<n>fan comics I just got.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm, which one should I start with?<n>Maybe a silly
four-panel anthology?<n>Or maybe this other one
here...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Actually, no. This one miiight be toointense to start the new year. I justknow it's gonna have me obsessed with tags I never knewexisted. I need something tamer...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital lounges<n>around her dorm
casually reading<n>through her collection of fanfics.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Imitation, huh? Yeah, I can honor my<n>oshis with my
body instead of just<n>my heart. Let's try it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that decided, Agnes Digital and I<n>head to the
training center.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. Be sure to take it all<n>in. I'm gonna
show you an<n>impersonation performance to
remember.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: First up, the Teio Step!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next, Palmer's explosive front<n>running! BFFs!
Hurdle run! Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to how avidly she watches<n>her cherished
Umamusume, she's<n>good at impersonating others.
She<n>might be able to put this to good use<n>in her
races.
